title: Analog Devices (ADI) at $375: Are Investors Paying an AI Premium for Industrial Tech?
excerpt: Is ADI a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Analog Devices, Inc. on Contrarian Indicator’s Substack by Cameron Fen. In this article, we wi...
content_html:
Is ADI a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Analog Devices, Inc. on Contrarian Indicator's Substack by Cameron Fen. In this article, we will summarize the bulls' thesis on ADI. Analog Devices, Inc.'s share was trading at $375.18 as of July 16th. ADI's trailing and forward P/E were 56.63 and 25.97 respectively according to Yahoo Finance.

Portogas D Ace/Shutterstock.com

Analog Devices, Inc. engages in the design, manufacture, testing, and marketing of integrated circuits (ICs), software, and subsystems products in the United States and internationally. Analog Devices is posting record revenue as AI data centers intensify demand for sophisticated power management, but investors must decide whether they are buying the next leg of a structural compute cycle or paying an AI multiple for an analog chipmaker still dependent on industrial restocking and a sluggish automotive market.

Read More: 15 AI Stocks That Are Quietly Making Investors Rich

Read More: Undervalued AI Stock Poised For Massive Gains: 10000% Upside Potential

Fiscal second quarter revenue reached $3.62 billion and adjusted diluted EPS rose to $3.09, with industrial and communications revenue increasing 56% and 79%, respectively, while management guided the August quarter to $3.9 billion of revenue, a 49% adjusted operating margin and $3.30 of adjusted EPS. The operating leverage is significant because higher factory utilization and a richer mix of industrial and communications products allow incremental revenue to reach earnings at an attractive rate, while trailing twelve month free cash flow of $4.57 billion gives ADI ample capacity to fund product development and shareholder returns.

The completed $1.5 billion cash acquisition of Empower Semiconductor adds a second leg to the thesis by filling a gap between ADI's existing power management portfolio and the processors at the center of AI systems. Empower's silicon capacitors are already in production, while its integrated voltage regulator programs are being developed with hyperscalers and AI chip designers, giving ADI an opportunity to capture more value as rising power density forces data center customers to move power conversion closer to GPUs and other processors.

At ADI's July 17 price of $375.29, the supplied consensus target of $447 implies approximately 19% upside, while the $515 bull case offers about 37%; reaching the upper target, however, requires more than another quarter of favorable comparisons because Empower must generate identifiable design wins and management must preserve margins near current levels even as the analog cycle normalizes. The central bearish argument is that the strongest growth categories are recovering from depressed customer inventories rather than establishing a new permanent demand baseline.

sentences.zh: 对 Empower Semiconductor 完成的 15 亿美元现金收购填补了 ADI 现有电源管理产品组合与人工智能系统核心处理器之间的空白，为本文增添了第二条腿。

sentences.en: Empower's silicon capacitors are already in production, while its integrated voltage regulator programs are being developed with hyperscalers and AI chip designers, giving ADI an opportunity to capture more value as rising power density forces data center customers to move power conversion closer to GPUs and other processors.
sentences.zh: Empower 的硅电容器已投入生产，而其集成稳压器项目正在与超大规模厂商和 AI 芯片设计人员一起开发，这使得 ADI 有机会获得更多价值，因为功率密度不断上升，迫使数据中心客户将电源转换移至更靠近 GPU 和其他处理器的位置。

blocks.html_en: At ADI's July 17 price of $375.29, the supplied consensus target of $447 implies approximately 19% upside, while the $515 bull case offers about 37%; reaching the upper target, however, requires more than another quarter of favorable comparisons because Empower must generate identifiable design wins and management must preserve margins near current levels even as the analog cycle normalizes. The central bearish argument is that the strongest growth categories are recovering from depressed customer inventories rather than establishing a new permanent demand baseline.

sentences.en: At ADI's July 17 price of $375.29, the supplied consensus target of $447 implies approximately 19% upside, while the $515 bull case offers about 37%; reaching the upper target, however, requires more than another quarter of favorable comparisons because Empower must generate identifiable design wins and management must preserve margins near current levels even as the analog cycle normalizes.
sentences.zh: 以 ADI 7 月 17 日的价格 375.29 美元计算，所提供的 447 美元的共识目标意味着大约 19% 的上涨空间，而 515 美元的牛市则意味着大约 37% 的上涨空间；然而，要达到上限目标，还需要超过四分之一的有利比较，因为即使模拟周期正常化，Empower 也必须产生可识别的设计胜利，管理层也必须保持接近当前水平的利润。

sentences.en: The central bearish argument is that the strongest growth categories are recovering from depressed customer inventories rather than establishing a new permanent demand baseline.
sentences.zh: 主要的看跌论点是，最强劲的增长类别正在从低迷的客户库存中恢复，而不是建立新的永久需求基准。

content_html_zh:
ADI 是一只值得买入的股票吗？ 我们在 Cameron Fen 的 Contrarian Indicator's Substack 上看到了一篇关于 Analog Devices, Inc. 的看涨论文。 在本文中，我们将总结 ADI 的多头论点。 截至 7 月 16 日，Analog Devices, Inc. 的股价为 375.18 美元。 根据雅虎财经的数据，ADI 的追踪和远期市盈率分别为 56.63 和 25.97。

波尔托加斯 D Ace/Shutterstock.com

Analog Devices, Inc. 在美国和国际上从事集成电路 (IC)、软件和子系统产品的设计、制造、测试和营销。 随着人工智能数据中心对复杂电源管理的需求不断增加，ADI公司的收入创下了历史新高，但投资者必须决定是购买结构计算周期的下一个阶段，还是为仍然依赖工业补货和低迷汽车市场的模拟芯片制造商支付人工智能倍数。

阅读更多：15只让投资者悄然致富的人工智能股票

阅读更多：被低估的人工智能股票有望大幅上涨：10000% 的上涨潜力

第二财季收入达到 36.2 亿美元，调整后稀释后每股收益升至 3.09 美元，其中工业和通信收入分别增长 56% 和 79%，而管理层预计 8 月份季度收入为 39 亿美元，调整后营业利润率为 49%，调整后每股收益为 3.30 美元。 运营杠杆非常重要，因为更高的工厂利用率以及更丰富的工业和通信产品组合使增量收入能够以有吸引力的速度实现盈利，而过去 12 个月的自由现金流为 45.7 亿美元，使 ADI 有足够的能力为产品开发和股东回报提供资金。

对 Empower Semiconductor 完成的 15 亿美元现金收购填补了 ADI 现有电源管理产品组合与人工智能系统核心处理器之间的空白，为本文增添了第二条腿。 Empower 的硅电容器已投入生产，而其集成稳压器项目正在与超大规模厂商和 AI 芯片设计人员一起开发，这使得 ADI 有机会获得更多价值，因为功率密度不断上升，迫使数据中心客户将电源转换移至更靠近 GPU 和其他处理器的位置。

以 ADI 7 月 17 日的价格 375.29 美元计算，所提供的 447 美元的共识目标意味着大约 19% 的上涨空间，而 515 美元的牛市则意味着大约 37% 的上涨空间；然而，要达到上限目标，还需要超过四分之一的有利比较，因为即使模拟周期正常化，Empower 也必须产生可识别的设计胜利，管理层也必须保持接近当前水平的利润。 主要的看跌论点是，最强劲的增长类别正在从低迷的客户库存中恢复，而不是建立新的永久需求基准。
